---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to / Send command / Call endpoint ...
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots where relevant.

## Environment

- Component: <!-- backend / dashboard / telegram bot / scheduler -->
- Environment: <!-- local / staging / production -->
- Python version (backend): <!-- e.g. 3.12.3 -->
- Node version (dashboard): <!-- e.g. 20.x -->
- Railway deployment ID (if production): <!-- optional -->

## Logs

```
Paste relevant logs here (sanitise any secrets or PII first)
```

## Additional context

Any other context that might help diagnose the issue.
